modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Move DocuSign template from TEST to PROD environment.

full_description_text:  
User wants to put a form into production.  
They need the DocuSign template and PowerForm moved from test to production.  
This is a request to finalize the setup.
